message:
fix: add GroupBeadIDWithPrefix for consistent ID helper signatures (gt-4p791p.11)

GroupBeadID hardcoded the "hq-" prefix with no WithPrefix variant, unlike
RigBeadID/AgentBeadID which both provide WithPrefix variants. Added
GroupBeadIDWithPrefix(prefix, name) and made GroupBeadID delegate to it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
